articles.summary: The Trump administration will increase average Medicare Advantage payments by 2.48%, or more than $13 billion, in 2027.

articles.title: Strait of Hormuz sees increased ship traffic ahead of Trump’s deadline. Here’s why oil prices are not budging.
articles.summary: The Strait of Hormuz saw an uptick in traffic over the weekend, as a looming U.S. deadline for Iran to reopen the key waterway kept markets on edge.

articles.title: Trump moves to scrap utility bill aid for Americans, as soaring energy costs hit over $1,000 on average this winter
articles.summary: The White House is moving to scrap a program that helps low-income people pay their utility bills at a time when Americans’ energy costs are surging.

articles.title: 3 factors that could get software stocks going again after a brutal stretch
articles.summary: It may not be a quick turnaround for the software sector, but here are three themes investors should monitor as they consider whether to re-engage.

articles.title: Americans are increasingly saying they won’t pay their taxes this year as a political protest. Here’s what could happen to them.
articles.summary: TikTok videos suggest paying taxes is voluntary — but that’s a myth. People who don’t pay can be fined and even end up in prison.

articles.title: Trwa sezon rozliczeń PIT. Jakie ulgi są najpopularniejsze i na co uważać?
articles.summary: Automatyzacja znacząco uprościła cały proces rozliczania PIT i wyeliminowała część błędów. Jednak doświadczenia z ubiegłych lat pokazują, że rozliczenia podatkowe nadal wymagają uwagi. Podpowiadamy, na co uważać.

articles.title: Cios dla gospodarki Iranu. Izrael zaatakował największy kompleks petrochemiczny
articles.summary: Izrael przeprowadził atak na jeden z największych irańskich kompleksów petrochemicznych w Asaluyeh. Atak ten, jak podkreśla minister obrony Izraela, może stanowić poważny cios dla gospodarki Iranu.

articles.title: Szok cenowy i uporczywa inflacja. Szef JPMorgan ostrzega, czym grozi wojna w Iranie
articles.summary: Szef JPMorgan Chase ostrzega, że to nie koniec konsekwencji wojny w Iranie dla gospodarki. Grozi jej uporczywa inflacja i podwyżki stóp procentowych powyżej oczekiwań rynku.

articles.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
articles.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.

articles.title: Ile kosztuje frank szwajcarski? Kurs franka do złotego PLN/CHF 06.04.2026
articles.summary: Kurs franka szwajcarskiego - 06.04.2026. W poniedziałek za jednego franka (CHF) trzeba zapłacić 4.6361 zł.

articles.title: Ile kosztuje dolar? Kurs dolara do złotego PLN/USD 06.04.2026
articles.summary: Kurs dolara - 06.04.2026. W poniedziałek za jednego dolara (USD) trzeba zapłacić 3.7115 zł.

articles.title: The cost to fly private is up as much as 20% with fuel prices soaring
articles.summary: Deep-pocketed travelers are less likely to get priced out as airfares rise, but they have to navigate unexpected fees related to the Iran war and rising fuel costs.

articles.title: United Airlines hikes checked bag fee by $10 as fuel prices continue to climb
articles.summary: United Airlines became the second U.S. carrier in a week to raise check bag fees as the industry grapples with a more than 80% jump in jet fuel costs.

articles.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
articles.summary: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
